title: astragalus elatus
intro: Astragalus elatus, also known as the towering milk vetch or elatosteme, is a perennial legume native to the mountainous regions of China and the Himalayas. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus elatus include its potential to boost the immune system, reduce fatigue, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory diseases such as bronchitis and asthma. Astragalus elatus can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its effects.
